title: Orbea woodii
taxonomy: Orbea woodii is classified in the family Apocynaceae, which is commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. It belongs to the genus Orbea, a group of succulent plants native to southern Africa. The specific classification of Orbea woodii is as follows: Orbea woodii (Pillans) Bruyns. It is also known by its synonym, Haworthia woodii (Pillans) Bruyns.
